Package
Description
org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse
Tools and helper classes for XML parsing.
org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse.spi
Some helper classes for the XML parse stuff.
  • Classes in org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse.spi used by org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse
    Class
    Description
    HandlerProvider
    The interface for a function that returns an instance of XMLParseEventHandler for an XML element.

    This is a functional interface whose functional method is HandlerProvider.retrieveHandler(String).
    StAXParserBase
    The abstract base class for StAX based XML parsers.
  • Classes in org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse.spi used by org.tquadrat.foundation.xml.parse.spi
    Class
    Description
    HandlerProvider
    The interface for a function that returns an instance of XMLParseEventHandler for an XML element.

    This is a functional interface whose functional method is HandlerProvider.retrieveHandler(String).
